title: Snowy Trees
description: Generate snow under trees in snowy biomes
body:
This mod improves the look of snowy forests by generating snow under the trees. You only need this mod installed on server side.

The original SnowUnderTrees mod created by 
bl4ckscor3 for forge can be found here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/snow-under-trees
